issuer_name_as_stated: Niva Bupa Health Insurance Company Limited
extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: for matters against the company, I counted 4 criminal proceedings, 29 tax proceedings, Nil statutory/regulatory proceedings and 8 material civil litigations; for directors, I counted 1 criminal proceeding and excluded all promoter/director personal matters from the aggregate amount. I excluded every “By the Company,” “By the Directors” and “By the Promoters” row; the quantified group amount is the stated Against the Company aggregate of ₹2,155.40 million, converted to ₹215.54 crore, rather than summing individual rows. The contingent-liabilities table is in ₹ millions as of June 30, 2024; no stated total row is provided, so the two disclosed line items, ₹447.65 million and ₹559.37 million, sum to ₹1,007.02 million, or ₹100.702 crore. The section provides no company-wide top-five or top-ten customer revenue concentration percentage; the disclosed percentages concern business lines, distribution channels and other non-customer concentrations, so those fields are null. Source monetary units are millions, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
